event_text: Tesla announced a price reduction across Model 3 and Model Y trims in China, citing competitive dynamics in the local EV market.
short_term_view: Sample short-term view: pricing actions historically pull forward demand but compress unit margin. Market reaction will hinge on sell-through evidence over the next print.
medium_term_view: Sample medium-term view: durable margin trajectory depends on FSD attach, energy storage mix, and software gross margin expansion.
risk_factors: FX and macro headwinds in China demand
